sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel data documented for NES version

special_mechanics.name: Bug Spray
special_mechanics.description: Stanley fires bug spray at Donkey Kong and insects; Super Sprayer variant pushes Donkey Kong upward at faster rate with limited duration

special_mechanics.name: Platform Movement
special_mechanics.description: Stanley runs and jumps on platforms beneath hanging Donkey Kong

tier_notes: Tier 3 - No precise physics parameters documented in available sources. Game is primarily a shoot-em-up with platformer elements. Sources describe gameplay mechanics qualitatively but contain no quantitative movement data, sub-pixel information, or physics constants.
sources_used: tcrf - The Cutting Room Floor (Donkey Kong 3 NES page)
